customer_messages.body: Your account has been identified as requiring priority attention. Our team has detected 5 active concerns — Regulatory hold, Overdue invoice, Delayed shipment, Escalated support, Usage decline — and a dedicated recovery team has been assigned to work with you. You will be contacted shortly with next steps and a resolution timeline.
